title: pilosella piloselliflora
intro: Pilosella piloselliflora, also known as hoary ragwort or lesser knapweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pilosella piloselliflora are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Pilosella piloselliflora can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
